proposition: A family relationship between Václav Faraga (b. 1989) and Petr Faraga (b. 1966) is plausible — shared surname, shared Znojmo address cluster, co-founding of Able.cz/BIT CONSULTING in 2012, and co-holdings in FaMe logistics and FaMe trade — but no public source states it. The same applies to Martin Patrik Faraga (FaMe logistics' founding co-owner).
shortTitle: A family relationship between Václav Faraga (b. 1989) and Petr…
statusExplanation: Analytické čtení citované evidence, nikoli přímo doložený fakt.
note: Assessment only; the relationship itself remains NOT_FOUND in public sources.
